teamMembers.name: Michael Robinson, D.D.S.
teamMembers.title: Lead Dentist
teamMembers.bio: Dr. Robinson is a Dallas native with a DDS earned in 1984, over 35 years in private practice, and ongoing continuing education with a focus on clear patient education and comprehensive care.

teamMembers.name: Alicia B.
teamMembers.title: Front Office / Practice Administrator
teamMembers.bio: Alicia joined the practice in 1989 and transitioned to practice administration in 2004, helping patients with operations and dental insurance guidance.

teamMembers.name: Aida Q., R.D.H.
teamMembers.title: Registered Dental Hygienist
teamMembers.bio: Aida joined in 2020 and focuses on preventive care and patient education after completing dental hygiene training at Texas A&M College of Dentistry.

teamMembers.name: Prezli B., R.D.A.
teamMembers.title: Dental Assistant
teamMembers.bio: Prezli joined in 2022 as a registered dental assistant and focuses on creating a comfortable and welcoming patient experience.

testimonials.author: Bishop Arts Dental
testimonials.text: Our practice is devoted to comprehensive and preventive patient care.

testimonials.author: Bishop Arts Dental
testimonials.text: Our patients are our most important asset, and we strive to develop long-lasting, trusting relationships.

rawPageText: Bishop Arts Dental PLLC presents itself as a Dallas dental office focused on comprehensive and preventive care. Homepage copy includes: 'Smile! You're in GREAT hands.' and emphasizes helping patients maintain optimal oral health through informed decisions and long-term relationships. The practice describes itself as a local, trusted office offering general and cosmetic dentistry with implants, veneers, and whitening. Services page copy highlights routine visits, cleanings, exams, oral cancer screenings, restorative treatments, root canal treatment, TMJ/TMD treatment, and emergency dental treatment for chipped, moved, or knocked-out teeth. Dr. Michael Robinson, D.D.S. is described as a Dallas native with a chemistry degree from the University of Dallas, a DDS earned in 1984, continuing education, and over 35 years in Dallas private practice. Team page content names Alicia (front office/practice administration), Aida (registered dental hygienist), and Prezli (registered dental assistant). Contact details shown across pages: 1218 N. Bishop Ave., Dallas, TX 75208, phone 214-942-9205. Hours shown: Monday through Wednesday 7:00 am to 6:00 pm; Thursday through Sunday closed. Insurance and financial pages state PPO claim support and mention CareCredit for extended payment plans.
